games.explanation: The market has ARI as a +158 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Mike Soroka keeps ARI competitive on the mound against Jesus Luzardo. The sim projects ARI to plate 5.0 runs — expect some fireworks.
MIA is getting plus-money at +130 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Chris Paddack keeps MIA competitive on the mound against Keider Montero. Cold temps suppress the bats.

The market has Athletics as a +132 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. J.T. Ginn keeps Athletics competitive on the mound against Clay Holmes. Cold temps suppress the bats.
STL is getting plus-money at +124 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Dustin May keeps STL competitive on the mound against Connelly Early. STL holds a commanding 70-point Elo edge.
